team_description: A complete startup product team covering core roles in product, technology, growth, and investment. From AI Product Manager to CTO, from Growth Hacker to Angel Investor, providing comprehensive AI advisory support for your startup.

members.name: AI Product Manager
members.description: Focuses on AI product definition, requirement analysis, and user experience design, helping teams build intelligent products.

members.name: Angel Investor
members.description: Early-stage investment expert, evaluates business models, teams, and market opportunities, providing strategic guidance for entrepreneurs.

members.name: Growth Hacker
members.description: Focuses on user growth and retention, using data-driven methods to achieve viral growth for products.

members.name: Frontend Architect
members.description: Frontend technology expert, responsible for technology selection, architecture design, and performance optimization, creating excellent user interfaces.

members.name: DevOps Expert
members.description: DevOps specialist, builds CI/CD pipelines, ensures system stability and deployment efficiency.

members.name: Content Strategist
members.description: Content marketing expert, develops content strategies to enhance brand influence and user engagement.

members.name: Brand Strategist
members.description: Brand building expert, defines brand positioning and tone, creates unique brand identity.
